MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Eskanos & Adler, APC's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories (general and economic), special interrogatories, request for admissions, and request for production of documents set #1 is granted. No opposition has been filed. The objections, other than those based on privilege, are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to provide further responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $595 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
